content:
做独立开发、内容创作最怕一句话没说好，隔天被敏感群体误读甚至冲上负面。 毕竟我们自己看自己写的文案，往往有“知识的诅咒”和盲区。

于是整了个新活，开源了一个内容风控/评论区模拟器：Kevlar-4u 。

title: 供应链攻击，正在蔓延，各位小心。逾 5500 个 GitHub 仓库在一场供应链攻击中遭感染
content: A supply‑chain attack has infected more than 5,500 GitHub repositories. Attackers increasingly control private keys, enabling stronger weapons and broader reach. The situation is escalating; users are urged to limit exposure by trimming workflows, disabling automatic updates, and tightening security. The spread is ongoing and likely to grow.

title: Bytecode VMs in surprising places (2024)
content: The article examines the increasingly common use of bytecode virtual machines beyond traditional runtime environments, highlighting new contexts such as embedded systems, IoT devices, and even browser-based applications. It explains how these VMs bring portability, security, and easier updates to platforms that require lightweight, sandboxed execution. The piece outlines key benefits, implementation strategies, and potential challenges faced when integrating bytecode engines into unconventional settings.

title: Why AI Isn’t Killing SaaS Yet
content: The interview examines actual AI spending data, arguing that the fear of a “SaaSpocalypse” is exaggerated. Experts discuss how companies are buying and using AI tools, the rise of Anthropic over OpenAI in the Ramp AI Index, token-based pricing, productivity gains, and the unexpected resilience of legacy software firms. The conversation highlights realistic AI adoption trends rather than catastrophic disruption.

title: Gorilla: A fast, scalable, in-memory time series database (2016)
content: "Gorilla is an in-memory time‑series database designed for speed and scalability. It enables rapid ingestion of large volumes of data, efficient querying, and high availability. The system supports compression, partitioning, and distributed query execution, making it suitable for real‑world monitoring and analytics workloads that demand low latency and high throughput. Its architecture focuses on optimizing storage and retrieval for time‑series data at scale."

title: 中国交易商在跨境资金流动遭严打后争相撤离
content: China traders are rapidly exiting the market following a crackdown on cross‑border capital flows. The tightening of regulations has prompted numerous investment firms to diversify away from China in response to new restrictions on money moving in and out. As a result, many traders seek to reduce exposure to Chinese assets and relocate their operations abroad.
